Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND (bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/75b580f293080d553918b76c31ce9f5673b47ad3352454c3f3d2d5fb93ffe2b2/cd331e6c-d106-463b-badf-c684ea0a6c08/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
